name: CloudHealth by VMware
description: CloudHealth by VMware — Multi-cloud cost governance and optimization platform for AWS, Azure, and GCP.

seo.title: CloudHealth by VMware — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: CloudHealth by VMware: CloudHealth by VMware — Multi-cloud cost governance and optimization platform for AWS, Azure, and GCP.

when_to_use: Multi-cloud cost governance across AWS, Azure, and GCP
Chargeback and showback reporting for internal departments
Rightsizing EC2 and VM instances with automated recommendations
Budget enforcement and anomaly detection across cloud accounts
Enterprise FinOps platform for large multi-cloud organizations

pros: Mature multi-cloud cost governance across AWS, Azure, GCP
cons: UI feels dated compared to newer entrants
review.verdict: Enterprise-grade FinOps platform under Broadcom cloud, watch licensing changes before committing long-term.
review.best_for: Large enterprises needing multi-cloud chargeback, policies, and compliance reporting
review.not_for: Startups and mid-market teams wanting quick self-serve cost insights
